site.title: OnSuite | Smart Manufacturing Management Platform
site.description: OnSuite - Manage your factory from a single smart platform. Combine your machine data and production processes in a modern dashboard.

hero.description: Real-time production visibility — line, station, shift. OEE, downtime, scrap analysis and action management. PLC to ERP integration + on-premise AI infrastructure.
feats: Real-time production visibility — line, station, shift
OEE · Downtime · Scrap analysis and action management
PLC to ERP integration + on-premise AI infrastructure

refMetrics.label: points OEE improvement
refMetrics.desc: Typical OEE increase range observed in the first 6 months after Connect + Optima deployment. Production efficiency increases as downtime causes become visible.

refMetrics.label: scrap and waste reduction
refMetrics.desc: Scrap reduction achieved through real-time quality control at line level with Trace + Jidoka modules. Recall time drops from hours to minutes.

refMetrics.label: manual reporting time reduction
refMetrics.desc: Automation of shift-end reporting process with DSF Forms + Optima integration. Operators focus on production instead of data entry.

sectorCases.title: Automotive & Suppliers
sectorCases.desc: IATF 16949 compliant traceability, OEE optimization and downtime analysis. Proven on high-volume assembly lines.

sectorCases.title: Food & Beverage
sectorCases.desc: Batch tracking, hygiene records and recall management. Dramatic drop in customer complaints with full lot traceability.

sectorCases.title: Tobacco
sectorCases.desc: Real-time monitoring and reporting automation on high-speed production lines. Shift-end reporting time reduced by 80%.

sectorCases.title: White Goods
sectorCases.desc: Assembly line OEE tracking and quality control integration. Connect infrastructure with multi-PLC brands consolidated production data.

sectorCases.title: Electronics & EMS
sectorCases.desc: Serial number-based traceability and test result integration on SMT lines. 62% scrap reduction measured in the first 4 months.

sectorCases.title: Machine & Metal
sectorCases.desc: CNC tool life management and preventive maintenance planning. Unexpected downtimes reduced by 40% in the first year.

connect.title: Every PLC, every protocol,
connect.desc: Unify all field hardware across different brands and protocols into a single standard. Brand-independent, sub-2-second latency, zero data loss.

optima.title: Make your lost hours
optima.desc: Automatically record downtime reasons. See loss analysis on a single screen. Assign actions, track, close. Average +12-18 points OEE increase in the first 6 months.

trace.title: From raw material to
trace.desc: Lot, serial number and BOM-based traceability. Which part, which operator, which machine, which shift — query the entire history in seconds.

bullets.title: Full Lot/Serial No recording
bullets.desc: Every process step from raw material to finished product

bullets.title: Customer recall readiness
bullets.desc: Recall time reduced from hours to minutes

bullets.title: Jidoka & blocking
bullets.desc: Automatic detection and stopping of non-quality products

productsGrid.title: 10 products · 90+ modules ·
productsGrid.subtitle: Start with a single module, grow to the platform. All products work integrated with each other.

backbone.name: Connect
backbone.desc: Universal PLC & protocol bridge connecting all field hardware to a single data layer.

backbone.name: Optima
backbone.desc: OEE analysis, downtime & scrap management, preventive maintenance. +12-18 points OEE in first 6 months.

backbone.name: Trace
backbone.desc: Full traceability based on lot, SN and BOM. Every step from shipment to field is recorded.

backbone.name: Integra
backbone.desc: Bidirectional integration with SAP, Logo, Netsis. Eliminates manual data transfer.

complementary.name: CNC
complementary.desc: Program and tool life data from Fanuc, Siemens 840D and Brother machines.

complementary.name: Live / Monitora
complementary.desc: Real-time monitoring, alarm management, recipe/formula editor and batch tracking.

complementary.name: Carboniq
complementary.desc: Energy consumption, carbon footprint and EU CBAM compliant ESG reporting.

complementary.name: DSF Forms
complementary.desc: Digital field forms and work orders. Paperless production operations.

complementary.name: TMC
complementary.desc: OPC UA TMC compliant tobacco industry solution.

complementary.name: Core / AI
complementary.desc: On-premise LLM, RAG and prediction models. AI analysis without data leaving the factory.

valueTabs.title: Measurable difference in
valueTabs.subtitle: Our customers come with operation problems, not product names. Which area interests you?

points.title: Full visibility on downtime causes
points.desc: Automatic recording, classification and responsibility assignment.

points.title: OEE-based performance tracking
points.desc: Real-time analysis by line, shift and equipment.

points.title: Action and improvement tracking
points.desc: Responsibility assignment, closure and effectiveness measurement.

points.title: Automatic quality monitoring
points.desc: Zero-escape target with Jidoka and checklists.

points.title: Full lot-based traceability
points.desc: LOT/SN tracking from raw material to shipment.

points.title: Real-time quality alarm
points.desc: Instant alarm and stop on out-of-limit measurements.

points.title: Machine-level energy monitoring
points.desc: kWh tracking by line and machine.

points.title: Carbon footprint
points.desc: ISO 50001 and EU CBAM compliant reporting.

points.title: Bidirectional ERP sync
points.desc: Real-time exchange with SAP, Logo, Netsis.

points.title: Multi-system management
points.desc: ERP, MES, SCADA and IoT from one point.

modules.title: Modular Solutions for
modules.subtitle: Use each module independently or combine them as a fully integrated platform.

items.name: OnTrace
items.desc: Full traceability from raw material to finished product on your production line. Reduce recall processes to seconds.

items.name: OnOptima
items.desc: Optimize your production processes with AI-powered analytics. Identify bottlenecks and take automatic actions.

items.name: OnIntegra
items.desc: Seamless integration with your ERP systems. SAP, Microsoft Dynamics and more.

items.name: OnConnect
items.desc: Every PLC, every protocol, one data point. Brand-independent connectivity layer.

items.name: OnCNC
items.desc: Automatic data collection from your CNC machines.

items.name: OnTMC
items.desc: OPC UA TMC compliant tobacco industry solutions.

items.name: OnSmartForms
items.desc: Go paperless. Automate data collection, approval workflows, and reporting with digital forms.

items.name: OnMonitora
items.desc: Monitor and analyze your machines in real time.

items.name: OnCarboniq
items.desc: Energy consumption, carbon footprint and ESG reporting.

items.name: OnCore
items.desc: On-premise AI for production intelligence. LLM, RAG and prediction models.

items.title: Connect
items.desc: Connect your PLCs, SCADA, and machine controllers to OnSuite. No need to change your existing infrastructure.

items.title: Collect
items.desc: All your production data is collected and processed in a central database in real time.

items.title: Analyze
items.desc: OEE, downtime analysis, quality metrics, and trend analytics are calculated automatically.

items.title: Optimize
items.desc: Continuously improve your processes with action recommendations and automatic alerts.

testimonial.quote: Thanks to OnSuite, we reduced downtime on our production line by 35%. Now we track all our data from a single screen. The integration process was completed much faster than we expected.
testimonial.name: Yilmaz Kaya
